word: G4366 - προσρήγνυμι - prosrḗgnymi - pros-rayg'-noo-mee - Beat vehemently against

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Beat vehemently against
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to break against, break by dashing against
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4314 and G4486; to tear towards, that is, burst upon (as a tempest or flood): - beat vehemently against (upon).
